revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月十七]][[zh:正月十七]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 17|qq=January 17}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}} the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Taishi (Jin)|ja|泰始|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi (Jin)|1=taishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11555697}} 2 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|266|en|266|qid=Q32109|lt=266|1=266}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Wu of Jin|en|Emperor Wu of Jin|qid=Q7356|lt=Sima Yan|1=Emperor Wu of Jin}} seized the imperial lineage from {{ill|Cao Huan|en|Cao Huan|qid=Q470091|lt=Cao Huan|1=Cao Huan}} , becoming Emperor Wu. The {{ill|Cao Wei|en|Cao Wei|qid=Q320930|lt=Cao Wei|1=Cao Wei}} dynasty fell, and the {{ill|Western Jin|ja|西晋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Western Jin Dynasty|qid=Q1145470}} was established. * {{ill|Yōwa|en|Yōwa|qid=Q729609|lt=Yōwa|1=Yōwa}} 1 (Julian calendar {{ill|1181|en|1181|qid=Q19704|lt=1181|1=1181}} {{ill|February 2|en|February 2|qid=Q2313|lt=February 2|1=February 2}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , who had been confined by the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 伊勢平氏}} , resumed {{ill|Cloistered rule|en|Cloistered rule|qid=Q865416|lt=cloistered rule|1=Cloistered rule}} following the death of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |Taira no Kiyomori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}} . * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bunei|1=Bun'ei}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1268|en|1268|qid=Q5520|lt=1268|1=1268}} {{ill|February 1|en|February 1|qid=Q2312|lt=February 1|1=February 1}} ) - An envoy from the {{ill|Mongol Empire|en|Mongol Empire|qid=Q12557|lt=Mongol Empire|1=Mongol Empire}} arrived in Japan seeking diplomatic relations, leading to the {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|en|Mongol invasions of Japan|qid=Q208156|lt=Mongol invasions of Japan|1=Mongol invasions of Japan}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 8 (Julian calendar {{ill|1580|en|1580|qid=Q6712|lt=1580|1=1580}} {{ill|February 2|en|February 2|qid=Q2313|lt=February 2|1=February 2}} ) - The {{ill|Siege of Miki|en|Siege of Miki|qid=Q11242477|lt=Siege of Miki|1=Siege of Miki}} ended with victory for the {{ill|Oda clan|en|Oda clan|qid=Q1132077|lt=Oda clan|1=Oda clan}} , led by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 9 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1798|en|1798|qid=Q7823|lt=1798|1=1798}} {{ill|March 4|en|March 4|qid=Q2396|lt=March 4|1=March 4}} ) - {{ill|Yushima Seidō|en|Yushima Seidō|qid=Q1760591|lt=Yushima Seidō|1=Yushima Seidō}} was renamed "{{ill|Shōheizaka Gakumonjo|ja|昌平坂学問所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōheizaka Gakumonjo|1=Shoheizaka Academy|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4059219}} " and placed under direct control of the shogunate.
== Births == * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1680|en|1680|qid=Q7642|lt=1680|1=1680}} {{ill|February 17|en|February 17|qid=Q2341|lt=February 17|1=February 17}} ) - {{ill|Tokugawa Yorisuke|ja|徳川頼職|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yorisuke|1=Tokugawa Yorimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6993725}} , 4th {{ill|Kishū Domain|en|Kishū Domain|qid=Q1069187|lt=Kishū Domain|1=Kishū Domain}} lord, older brother of {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q319664}} (+ {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 2 ({{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}} )). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1146161}} 2 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1765|en|1765|qid=Q7665|lt=1765|1=1765}} {{ill|March 8|en|March 8|qid=Q2395|lt=March 8|1=March 8}} ) - {{ill|Tsugaru Yasuchika|en|Tsugaru Yasuchika|qid=Q7849985|lt=Tsugaru Yasuchika|1=Tsugaru Yasuchika}} , 9th {{ill|Hirosaki Domain|en|Hirosaki Domain|qid=Q903555|lt=Hirosaki Domain|1=Hirosaki Domain}} lord (+ {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 4 ({{ill|1833|en|1833|qid=Q7587|lt=1833|1=1833}} )). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|February 10|en|February 10|qid=Q2325|lt=February 10|1=February 10}} ) - {{ill|Yabunouchi Setsuan|ja|藪内節庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yabunouchi Setsuan|1=Yabunouchi Setsuan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q74145535}} , {{ill|Tea master|ja|茶人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tea master|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 茶人人物一覧|1=list of Tea masters|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11617948}} (+ {{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|qid=Q327567|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa era}} 15 ({{ill|1940|en|1940|qid=Q18633|lt=1940|1=1940}} )).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 8 (Julian calendar {{ill|1580|en|1580|qid=Q6712|lt=1580|1=1580}} {{ill|February 2|en|February 2|qid=Q2313|lt=February 2|1=February 2}} ) - {{ill|Bessho Nagaharu|en|Bessho Nagaharu|qid=Q837435|lt=Bessho Nagaharu|1=Bessho Nagaharu}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5384684}} (* {{ill|1558|en|1558|qid=Q6601|lt=1558|1=1558}} ?).
== References == {{Reflist|qq=}}
== See Also ==

[[ja:己亥]]
[[ar:January 17 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月十七]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月十七]] {{wikidata link|Q838983}} [[Category:Days 17 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
